message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ParticipantFontSize 24
  MessageFontSize 24
}

participant "DASH client" as DASH
participant "License proxy" as PROXY
participant "License server" as SERVER

DASH -> PROXY : Get license

activate PROXY
PROXY -> PROXY : Check if user is authorized

PROXY -> SERVER : Get license\n(Proprietary proof of authorization attached)
activate SERVER
SERVER --> PROXY : License
deactivate SERVER

PROXY --> DASH : License
deactivate PROXY
@enduml
